questionHtml: Find the pH value for a solution in which the hydrogen ion concentration is 5.2×10−8.
markschemeHtml:
* This sample question was produced by experienced DP mathematics senior examiners to aid teachers in preparing for external assessment in the new MAA course. There may be minor differences in formatting compared to formal exam papers.

pH=-log105.2×10-8=7.29 7.28399…        (M1)A1

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Find the pH value for a solution in which the hydrogen ion concentration is 5.2×10−8.
